description: Model a residential energy system in SketchUp Make 2017. 1) Set units to Architectural (Feet/Inches). 2) Draw a 30 ft (North-South) x 20 ft (East-West) house footprint and push/pull 10 ft high walls. 3) Create a 6:12 pitch gable roof with the ridge running North-South along the 30 ft length. 4) Use the Skelion plugin to place solar panels on the West-facing roof slope in portrait orientation. 5) On the East-facing wall, model and place two separate rectangular components representing Balance of System equipment: a Battery (45 inches high x 30 inches wide x 6 inches deep, mounted 2 feet above the ground) and an Inverter (21 inches high x 14.5 inches wide x 7 inches deep, adjacent and top-aligned with the battery). 6) Save the completed model to 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\solar_plus_storage.skp'.
